title: MLB season preview: Rankings, playoff odds for all 30 teams as baseball returns
content: Whether your club enters Opening Day as the team to beat or hoping to be 2026's biggest surprise, we've got you covered.

title: LB David retires as one of Bucs' all-time greats
content: Linebacker Lavonte David announced his retirement Tuesday after a 14-year career with the Tampa Bay Buccaneers in which he was a 12-time captain and has led the league in tackles since he entered the NFL.

title: Tua: 'Got to play better' to become Falcons' QB1
content: Former Dolphin Tua Tagovailoa said Tuesday he has "got to play better football" if he wants a chance to become the Atlanta Falcons' starting quarterback.

title: Arkansas' Acuff lands historic Reebok shoe deal
content: Arkansas star Darius Acuff Jr. has landed a signature shoe with Reebok, becoming the first NCAA men's athlete to receive one with a major U.S. brand while still in college, head of basketball at Reebok, Jide Osifeso, tells ESPN.

title: Hurley asks rival fans to join forces in Sweet 16
content: Coach Dan Hurley is pleading for rival UConn and St. John's fans to rally together -- for one night -- and root for each other in the Sweet 16 of the NCAA tournament.

title: Texas rookie gets mound visit, told he made team
content: The mound visit Carter Baumler received from Rangers manager Skip Schumaker on Monday night wasn't to take the rookie right-hander out of his last spring training game, but rather to let him know he made the Opening Day roster.

title: With baby coming, Scheffler exits Houston Open
content: Scottie Scheffler withdrew from the Houston Open on Tuesday, a tournament that was always questionable for him to play because his wife is expecting their second child.

title: Amputee cornhole player faces murder charges
content: A county sheriff's office in Maryland said Monday that a professional cornhole player who's also a quadruple amputee fatally shot a passenger in the front seat of a car he was driving during an argument.

title: ⚾ Fantasy baseball draft guide: Rankings, more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

title: What's next for Florida, Kansas, Kentucky, UNC: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: Their NCAA tournament runs ended early and now it's all about next season. Here's how it's taking shape.

title: The trade that wasn't: Inside the Maxx Crosby saga between the Raiders, Ravens
content: We talked to people about the Maxx Crosby trade situation to find out what really went down between Baltimore and Las Vegas.

title: Predicting Rounds 1-2 of the NFL draft: Yates finds landing spots for 64 top prospects
content: Field Yates unveils his latest NFL mock draft, projecting two full rounds. Which top prospects could go in the opening 64 picks?

title: Meet the 'Tokyo Toe' -- the NFL draft's most interesting kicker prospect
content: After learning how to kick and teaching himself English, Kansei Matsuzawa's dream is nearing reality.

title: Tiger to return with Jupiter's TGL season on line
content: Tiger Woods told ESPN that he'll play in Match 2 of the best-of-three TGL finals in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida.

title: UConn star Azzi Fudd and the family behind her final March
content: Azzi Fudd's "imperfectly perfect" family has been her rock through ACL tears, dog food pranks and Beyoncé on repeat. Now they're hoping for one more NCAA tournament title for UConn.

title: Ranking the remaining 16 teams in the women's NCAA tournament
content: Six SEC teams and five from the ACC (including a 10-seed!) help make up the Sweet 16. Here's how they stack up.

content: Which 2026 NBA draft prospects helped or hurt their stock after an exciting first weekend during March Madness?

content: Can Phoenix make up ground in the West standings? Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings.

title: Robot umps in MLB? What to know about new balls-and-strikes challenge system
content: Baseball's next big rule change is here. Here is how automated ball-strike challenges will shape the 2026 season.

title: NHL playoff watch: What's at stake in all 15 games Tuesday
content: With 30 teams in action, the playoff picture will shift Tuesday night. Here's what to watch for specifically.

title: From Dowman to Messi: Picking the world's best soccer players at every age
content: Age is just a number -- except in soccer. We look at the best players from every birth year, spanning ages 16 to 38.

title: Antoine Griezmann alone can't salvage Orlando's rough-looking rebuild
content: The best stars in MLS make already-good teams better. With Orlando, Griezmann will be joining a rebuild.

title: NWSL Power Rankings: Angel City, Dash on the rise but Thorns still on top
content: Angel City and the Houston Dash are quickly making their way to the top of ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, but their rise isn't enough to make them No. 1.

title: Feeling lucky? What turnovers and late-game success say about 2026
content: Some 2025 teams couldn't get a break. Others, such as Indiana, had luck and success. What changes in 2026?

title: How Jaxon Smith-Njigba's contract extension impacts Seahawks, Rams' Puka Nacua
content: Answering five questions about the record-breaking contract extension for the NFL's top receiver in 2025.

title: Women's tournament: UConn still title favorite as Virginia upset shakes up the odds
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: Pakistan to mediate Iran-US talks? Trump reposts PM Shehbaz Sharif's tweet
content: Pakistan has offered to host talks between the United States and Iran to end the ongoing conflict. Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif expressed Islamabad's readiness to facilitate these discussions. President Donald Trump shared Sharif's post, fueling speculation about potential backchannel diplomacy. Reports suggest Pakistan is leveraging its ties to act as a neutral venue.

title: IPL 2026: Josh Hazelwood to join RCB squad when 'Cricket Australia are happy'
content: RCB director of cricket Mo Bobat said on Tuesday that the franchise is working closely with Cricket Australia and medical staff as Hazlewood continues his recovery in Australia.

title: 'Eye for a head': Iran threatens US, sets tough conditions for ending war
content: Iran issued a severe warning to Donald Trump, stating that any attack on its infrastructure would result in an "eye for a head" response, potentially paralyzing America. Tehran has hardened its negotiating stance, demanding an end to the war, guarantees against future military action, compensation, and control of the Strait of Hormuz before considering peace talks.

title: Sam Altman's yes to deal that Anthropic rejected haunts OpenAI as exodus continues
content: OpenAI faces a significant user exodus from ChatGPT following a deal with the Pentagon, which Anthropic had rejected.  Rival AI Claude has seen a massive surge in usage, with millions of subscribers reportedly leaving ChatGPT.  This "QuitGPT" movement is fueled by concerns over OpenAI's political contributions and its work with government agencies.

title: KKR retire Andre Russell's No. 12 jersey - Here is why
content: At a preseason event in Kolkata, KKR retired Andre Russell’s No. 12 jersey, honouring his impact and loyalty. Despite past exit rumours, he stayed committed and now takes on a Power Coach role. Russell reflected emotionally on his career, saying he “left everything on the field.” Meanwhile, Rinku Singh was named vice-captain under Ajinkya Rahane for the new season.

title: Is Saudi Arabia calling the shots? Crown Prince MBS urging Trump to keep Iran war alive - report
content: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman is reportedly urging US President Trump to escalate military action against Iran, viewing it as a chance to reshape the Middle East.  He believes removing Iran's current government is key to addressing the threat to Gulf nations.  However, Riyadh officially denies pushing for war, emphasizing a peaceful resolution and self-defense against Iranian attacks.

title: H-1B visa registrations dip 30-50%: List of cos emerging as ‘favourites’ in new system
content: H-1B visa registrations for FY27 have plummeted by 30-50%, driven by higher fees and a new lottery prioritizing wages. This shift benefits mid-tier IT firms and US Master's graduates, while large outsourcing companies face reduced dominance. The recalibration signals a move towards quality talent and increased costs for employers.

title: Taliban frees American academic Dennis Coyle after more than a year in detention
content: American academic Dennis Coyle, detained for over a year in Afghanistan, has been released by Taliban authorities on humanitarian grounds coinciding with Eid al-Fitr. While Washington welcomes this positive step, it renews calls for the return of other Americans still believed to be held, emphasizing an end to 'hostage diplomacy'.

title: Israel to occupy southern Lebanon, create 'security zone'
content: Israel plans to establish a security zone up to the Litani River in southern Lebanon, a significant escalation against Hezbollah. Lebanon responded by expelling Iran's ambassador, citing diplomatic violations. This move escalates regional tensions, with France urging Israel to avoid a wider ground operation while supporting Lebanon's diplomatic action.

title: Angry Bernie Sanders to Jeff Bezos: Explain what happens when millions lose their jobs
content: Senator Bernie Sanders has demanded Jeff Bezos testify before Congress regarding a $100 billion AI manufacturing fund. Sanders decried the plan to replace factory workers with robots as a "declaration of war against the working class." He seeks answers on worker displacement, severance, healthcare, and retirement for those impacted by this automation push.

title: Karan Johar hugs Yami Gautam amid Dhurandhar 2 success, calls her favourite actor
content: Karan Johar's recent public embrace with Yami Gautam at an Amazon Prime Video event has sparked online discussion, especially given past alleged snubs. Johar's praise for Gautam and his expressed 'FOMO' for her film 'Dhurandhar' suggest a potential reconciliation after past industry perceived slights.

title: Dallas Cowboys nearly landed Maxx Crosby before deal collapsed at last second, per insider
content: Dallas Cowboys made a significant push to acquire Raiders' star defensive end Maxx Crosby, reportedly offering a 2026 first-round pick and a 2027 second-rounder. However, a failed physical with the Baltimore Ravens, who were also in pursuit, scuttled a potential deal. Crosby remains with the Raiders, his future value now a subject of speculation.

title: Puka Nacua’s Los Angeles Rams linked to $61 million Buffalo Bills linebacker
content: Several analysts are linking veteran linebacker Matt Milano to the Los Angeles Rams. They suggest he could bolster their defense alongside Nate Landman. Despite past injuries, Milano’s extensive experience and potential impact are seen as valuable assets for a Super Bowl push that Los Angeles needs. The Rams have addressed their secondary by signing cornerbacks and may draft with regards to offensive side of the ball. But in terms of the defensive side, they may target a veteran linebacker in free agency, and Milano could be a great fit.

title: Minecraft 26.1 Update: Tiny Takeover revamps baby mobs; global rollout on March 24–25
content: Mojang's Tiny Takeover update, arriving March 24, 2026, revamps Minecraft's baby mobs with new models, sounds, and animations. Players can now craft Golden Dandelions to halt mob growth and craftable Name Tags. The patch also promises lighting and performance enhancements, making the game more visually appealing and smoother for all.

title: Megan Thee Stallion opens up on feeling like a burden amid Klay Thompson romance
content: Megan Thee Stallion, the six time Grammy winner, has turned heads with her high profile relationship with the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson. As fans root for an engagement announcement, Megan Thee Stallion's heartbreaking statements about feeling "too much" have sparked chaos and made fans emotional over the pain she has gone through in her life before she met the NBA legend.

title: 'I have an interest': Ganguly breaks silence on coaching future
content: Former Team India captain Sourav Ganguly says he remains deeply involved in cricket and is open to coaching in the future after his stint with Pretoria Capitals. He stressed his passion for the game and willingness to explore opportunities. Ganguly backed Test cricket as the toughest format, said the IPL Impact Player rule will stay, praised IPL’s growth, and highlighted young talents like Auqib Nabi.

title: 'Hatched conspiracy': Why J&K separatist Asiya Andrabi got life sentence in UAPA case
content: A Delhi court has handed down life imprisonment to Kashmiri separatist leader Asiya Andrabi for conspiring against the state. Her associates, Sofi Fehmeeda and Nahida Nasreen, received 30-year sentences. The court found they plotted Kashmir's secession from India, using speeches and social media to advocate for its merger with Pakistan and portray it as under illegal occupation.

title: CSK bring in Australian pacer as replacement for injured Ellis
content: Chennai Super Kings (CSK) have signed Spencer Johnson as a replacement for injured pacer Nathan Ellis ahead of IPL 2026. Ellis, ruled out with a hamstring injury, was expected to lead the attack, making his absence a big setback. Johnson, with international and IPL experience, joins for Rs 1.5 crore as CSK look to fill the gap and stay competitive.

title: Alcaraz steps away for family break after Miami Open loss to Sebastian
content: Carlos Alcaraz suffered a third-round loss to Sebastian Korda at the 2026 Miami Open and plans to take a short break. Speaking after the match, he said he wants to spend time with family and reset before the clay season. He also praised Korda’s performance and called him the deserved winner of the match.

title: 'Strong India good for US': Trump admin on countering China's hold on Indo-Pacific
content: The US views India as crucial for a balanced Indo-Pacific, emphasizing deeper defense and strategic ties. A senior official highlighted shared interests in a region free from single-power dominance.  Both nations aim to enhance operational interoperability and India's defense capabilities, fostering co-production and a strong domestic industry.

title: After Trump's sanction waiver, Reliance buys 5m barrels of Iran crude oil: Report
content: The move follows large-scale buying of Russian crude by Indian refiners, who secured more than 40 million barrels to deal with supply crunch from the Middle East.

title: Transgender Rights Amendment Bill passed in Lok Sabha amid opposition protest
content: The Lok Sabha has passed the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026, defining transgender individuals to exclude those with different sexual orientations or self-perceived identities. The bill aims to protect a specific social and cultural group facing extreme discrimination, with new provisions for authority designation and graded punishments for offenses. Opposition members criticized the bill for limiting self-determination.

title: 'US will never give up the Moon again': Nasa plans lunar base, n-powered spacecraft to Mars
content: NASA unveiled ambitious initiatives to accelerate its return to the Moon, aiming for a lunar landing by the end of President Trump's term and establishing a long-term presence. The agency's updated Moon strategy focuses on a phased approach to building a lunar base, incorporating commercial and international partnerships to support frequent crewed missions and sustained human operations.

title: 'Kill network': China sees red as Japan deploys upgraded long-range Type-12 missiles
content: China's PLA has condemned Japan's planned deployment of upgraded Type-12 missiles, warning of a "kill network" targeting coastal and inland areas. This move, aimed at deterring China in a Taiwan conflict, expands Japan's long-range strike capabilities, raising regional tensions.

title: Decoding DhuranDHAR Derangement Syndrome: Bollywood finally learns the art of myth-making
content: From agitprop accusations to civilisational storytelling: why Dhurandhar duology has struck such a nerve...

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office Day 6: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 650 cr India gross milestone
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its historic dominance at the box office, amassing a staggering Rs. 844.76 crore in worldwide gross collections. This global haul is fueled by a robust Rs. 619.76 crore from the domestic Indian market and a powerful Rs. 225.00 crore from overseas territories. Currently, the high-octane sequel has already secured a domestic net collection of Rs. 519.12 crore, firmly establishing it as one of the fastest Indian films to reach these elite milestones.

title: Jake Dennis with Lexi Grace Boosey at Madrid E-Prix, share moments
content: Jake Dennis of Andretti has shared a post about his racing experience at the Madrid E-Prix, where he finished sixth. Meanwhile, his fiancee Lexi Grace Boosey has shared pictures from their off-track moments in the city, having accompanied him on the trip. The couple have also constructed a new home in Spain.

title: All about the actor who played Shirani Baloch in 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge'
content: Aditya Dhar's spy thriller storms box office with Ranveer Singh, Arjun Rampal. Bimal Oberoi, actor-producer (PK, Tiger 3), plays radical leader inspired by Maulana Shirani & Akbar Bugti. Short but powerful role adds tension.

title: 'Kantara' controversy row: Ranveer ready to submit affidavit of apology in court
content: Ranveer Singh has offered an unconditional apology to the Karnataka High Court regarding his imitation of a ritual from 'Kantara Chapter 1', which had drawn criticism for hurting religious sentiments. The court, however, orally observed the imitation was inappropriate, with a judge emphasizing the responsibility of superstars. The actor had previously apologized on social media for his actions.

title: Who is Ryan Williams? Australia-born footballer likely to play for India
content: The Australian-born forward was included after FIFA approved his change of association, allowing him to represent India at the senior level. He had earlier been part of the preparatory camp for the Bangladesh qualifier but could not make the squad due to pending paperwork.

title: ‘Don’t just say ED, ED, ED’: SC questions Bengal govt in Mamata I-PAC raid case
content: The Supreme Court questioned West Bengal's objection to the ED's plea alleging obstruction by Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee during a raid. Justices emphasized the fundamental rights of individual ED officers, urging the state to focus on their alleged victimhood rather than just the agency.

title: When will Iran's regime fall? Here's what Mossad chief said
content: Mossad chief David Barnea reportedly presented a nuanced view on Iran's regime change, suggesting it was possible but likely a year-long process, not a swift collapse. This assessment, emphasizing conditions and time, contrasts with claims of expecting rapid uprisings. Recent statements indicate the Iranian regime remains intact but weakened.

title: After Shanaka & Blessing, third foreign player leaves PSL, is he CSK bound?
content: The 33-year-old right-arm fast bowler withdrew from the PSL last week, and Pakistani news outlet Geo Super reported on Tuesday that the PSL franchise Hyderabad Kingsmen are weighing up their options to replace Baartman.

title: Harish Rana, India's first passive euthanasia case, dies after 13 years in vegetative state
content: India's first passive euthanasia recipient, Harish Rana, passed away at AIIMS-Delhi after 13 years in a vegetative state. The Supreme Court had permitted the withdrawal of life support, allowing a dignified end. This case reignited the debate on 'letting a patient die' versus actively ending life, highlighting the legal and ethical complexities surrounding end-of-life decisions.

title: Alcohol, betrayal and more: How ‘lover’ plotted murder in UP, beheads Delhi woman
content: A Delhi woman, Babli Devi, was brutally murdered in Bulandshahr. Police discovered her body near a canal. Her lover, Vikas, and two others allegedly beheaded her. Babli's family identified her through a social media post. Vikas, who had a relationship with Babli after her husband's death, is the prime accused. He has been arrested along with an accomplice.

title: Sunrise and Sunset Time on March 25, 2026; Powerful remedies to appease Lord Surya
content: On March 25, 2026, in New Delhi, sunrise is at 6:21 AM and sunset at 6:34 PM. To embrace auspiciousness and divine energy, wake early for a holy bath and offer water to Lord Surya using a copper vessel. Seek your father's blessings, perform Surya Namaskar, and chant powerful mantras to enhance spiritual power and vitality.

title: PM Modi compares fuel crisis to Covid-19 in Parl; Rahul says 'don't forget the deaths'
content: Rahul Gandhi criticized PM Modi's comparison of the current fuel crisis to the Covid-19 pandemic, highlighting the tragic loss of life during the pandemic. He also accused Modi of compromising India's foreign policy and questioned the government's handling of the West Asia conflict and the stranded Indian ships.

title: Boxing divisional rankings: Adames defends WBC title and top spot at middleweight
content: Carlos Adames stays on top in the 160-pound rankings following a dominant title defense against Austin Williams. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United ready to move for Bayern star Davies
content: Manchester United are interested in signing Bayern Munich left back Alphonso Davies. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Gujarat Government tables UCC Bill in Assembly
content: The Bill was tabled by Chief Minister Bhupendra Patel a week after a State-appointed panel submitted its final report on implementation of the UCC; the Bill proposes a common framework for marriage, succession and live-in relationships

title: Court cannot sit in judgment on a community’s belief, says Travancore Devaswom Board
content: Temple board files submissions in Supreme Court regarding entry of women of all ages into Sabarimala shrine; court’s review hearing to start on April 7; Kerala govt. had softened its stance on the issue

title: Delhi court sentences Kashmiri separatist Asiya Andrabi to life imprisonment in UAPA case
content: The court also sentenced two associates of Andrabi — Sofi Fehmeeda and Nahida Nasreen — who were also convicted for 30 years in prison in the same case

title: Assembly Elections highlights: DMK allocates 10 seats for  Premallatha Vijayakant led DMDK in T.N. polls
content: The poll authority also met with the Multi-Departmental Committee on Election Intelligence (MDCEI) to enhance coordination, curb illegal activities, and ensure smooth, secure, violence-free and inducement-free elections across poll-bound States.

title: Transgender bill passed by voice vote in Lok Sabha amid walkout by Opposition MPs
content: NDA MPs hail Bill, say it protects transgender community from ‘infiltrators’ wanting to misuse self-identification to corner benefits

title: SC directs appointment of legal aid lawyers to Manipur violence victims without delay
content: The court records the Manipur Advocate General’s assurance that he would personally ensure the appointment of legal aid counsel

title: CAPF Bill likely in Rajya Sabha on March 25; eight-hour discussion allocated
content: Retired CAPF officials have opposed the Bill stating that government is discriminating against cadre officers who won the case after 10 years of litigation to overcome career stagnation

title: Karnataka: Higher Education Dept. cancels event on Deendayal Upadhyay at KSOU following protocol violation row
content: As the objective and subject matter of the conference are found to be inconsistent with the aims and objectives of the university, granting permission for a private programme in violation of government guidelines, rules, and protocol cannot be accepted, the govt. said before cancelling the programme with immediate effect

title: Karnataka High Court issues notice on PIL over hardships caused by Rajajinagar private school
content: The petitioner has also claimed that the school has constructed a new building, allegedly in the buffer area of a stormwater drain sans any approval

title: RCB acquired by consortium for ₹ 166 billion
content: It has been sold to a consortium comprising Aditya Birla Group, The Times of India Group, Bolt Ventures, and Blackstone’s perpetual private equity strategy, BXPE for a total consideration of ₹ 166.6 billion

title: Regulator asks city gas distributors to make available piped gas to residential schools, colleges, hostels within five days
content: Officials say that India holds the capacity to add 15 lakh new PNG connections over the next two weeks

title: AIADMK assures ration card-holders of free dal and cooking oil in its manifesto for the 2026 Assembly election
content: The distribution of free refrigerators to women beneficiaries of the PDS, the revision of electricity tariff on common facilities in multi-storey apartments, and the increase in horizontal reservation for government school students in admission to the medical courses from 7.5% to 10.5% are among the highlights of the manifesto

title: U.S. President Trump dials PM Modi, discusses need for keeping Strait of Hormuz open
content: This is the first conversation between the two leaders since February 28, when the war broke out and has since killed at least six Indians in the West Asia region; the conflict has impacted free movement of energy resources through the Strait of Hormuz

title: West Asia crisis: India’s foreign policy is “compromised”, considered a “universal joke”, says LoP Rahul Gandhi
content: Slams PM for comparing West Asia crisis to COVID-19 pandemic; to miss all-party meet on West Asia due to poll events in Kerala; attacks Centre over reports that Pakistan may mediate between Iran, U.S.

title: Women short-changed yet again as Kerala’s poll fronts refuse to change course
content: Although Kerala is the only Indian State where women outnumber men, this demographic strength has never translated into political power; in the 140 Assembly constituencies in the State, the LDF has fielded  17 women candidates, the UDF 12, and the NDA 14

title: Only Hindus, Buddhists, Sikhs can claim Scheduled Caste status: Supreme Court
content: Conversion to any other religion will lead to immediate, complete loss of Scheduled Caste status, regardless of birth, says Bench as it invokes Clause 3 of Constitution (Scheduled Castes) Order, 1950

title: Centre intensifies regulatory surveillance over weight loss drugs
content: India’s drugs controller, in collaboration with State regulators, has initiated a series of targeted actions to curb possible malpractices across the pharmaceutical supply chain and prevent unauthorised sales and use

title: Ahom heartland fight gets a ‘friendly’ twist, as the BJP fields a candidate against ally AGP
content: Creating a triangular contest in Sibsagar, BJP gives a ticket to former ULFA leader Kushal Dowari to take on the AGP’s Prodip Hazarika, as well as Raijor Dal president Akhil Gogoi, the incumbent MLA

title: How would you react if you were in power at Centre, and a rival CM did this? SC asks Mamata Banerjee
content: Court’s query comes in reaction to submissions made by both Ms. Banerjee and State of West Bengal that Directorate of Enforcement (ED) cannot move Supreme Court directly under Article 32 of Constitution, “crying” violation of its fundamental rights.

title: Karnataka home to 274 springs; Belagavi district tops list with 59
content: State’s first Spring Census notes that Western Ghats and Malnad regions are primary hubs for spring formation due to high rainfall and favourable geological conditions

title: Congress Isolated as SP, DMK engage with government on women’s quota rollout
content: While Congress demands an all-party meeting on the Women’s Reservation Act, key INDIA bloc allies meet Amit Shah and signal support for government’s proposal

title: Examine ill-effects of Conocarpus trees before future plantation, Karnataka High Court directs GBA
content: It has been pointed out in the petition that the States of Tamil Nadu, Gujarat, Telangana and Andhra Pradesh have already prohibited planting of saplings of Conocarpus species

title: Karnataka received less than 50% of funds allocated by Centre under JJM: Audit report
content: The state received ₹11,189.37 crore — about 45% of the total allocation of ₹24,819.48 crore — due to poor engagement with the scheme

title: Karnataka govt. to seek legal opinion to initiate action against Adani Group’s firm over ₹850-crore dues
content: The Minister reiterated that recovery could not be enforced immediately as the dues were under dispute

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: DMK finalises seat-sharing with allies, likely to contest in 175 seats
content: DMDK allocated 10 seats in SPA; Makkal Needhi Maiam founder Kamal Haasan opted out of the poll fray but extended full support to the DMK-led SPA

title: India an ‘essential’ U.S. partner in Indo-Pacific, its rise is good for American interests, says top Pentagon official
content: U.S. Assistant Secretary Elbridge Colby says India and U.S. can live with their differences; makes no mention of Quad

title: What will be the fallout of West Asia war on economy, Opposition asks government
content: We have the fastest-falling currency, says Congress MP, countering BJP’s ‘fastest-growing economy’ claim

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Elathur, a red bastion, now faces a competitive race
content: Sensing an opportunity, Congress appears to be positioning itself to capitalise on the factional tussle within NCP(SP) to wrest the Elathur seat back from the Left Democratic Front

title: T. N. Prathapan rolls out 10 guarantees for Manalur, unveils local manifesto
content: UDF candidate promises dialysis centre, low-cost pharmacy, Rs 10 lunch scheme, startup park and AI labs if elected from Manalur

title: Row erupts in Nemom over Rajeev Chandrasekhar’s alleged non-disclosure of property
content: Despite the objections, the Returning Officer accepted the BJP candidate’s nomination, maintaining it did not violate any grounds for rejection as stated in the Candidate’s Handbook 2023

title: In J&K, 6-Year-Old Offers Piggy Bank For War-Affected People In Iran
content: The donation drives follow the joint military operation launched on February 28, which targeted various sites in Iran.

title: Centre May Delay Bills On Women's Quota, Not Table Them This Session: Sources
content: The government has indicated that a special session could be convened specifically for the Women's Reservation Bill, or alternatively, its introduction could be considered during the Monsoon Session, sources said

title: Parliament Budget Session 2026 Highlights: PM Modi Addresses Rajya Sabha On Middle East Conflict
content: Parliament Budget Session 2026 LIVE Updates: On Monday, PM Modi addressed citizens' concerns with regard to the impact of the US-Israel conflict with Iran and the challenges it has created for India.

title: Transgender Bill Passed Amid Resistance By Opposition, Activists
content: The bill aims to provide a "precise definition" of transgender persons, focusing on those facing severe social exclusion due to biological conditions. The self-perceived gender identities are excluded

title: No Permission Needed To Cross Strait Of Hormuz Amid Iran War, Says Centre
content: The remark came in response to a question on if India had sought Iran's permission or paid for the transit of its stranded vessels through Strait of Hormuz.

title: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Trump Calls PM Modi To Discuss Middle East War
content: US President Donald Trump threatened to "obliterate" Iran's power plants if Tehran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz for shipping traffic.

title: At Uddhav Thackeray's Farewell, Praise From D Fadnavis And An E Shinde Dig
content: Uddhav Thackeray's tenure in the Maharashtra Legislative Council ended today along with eight other members

title: Centre Forms 7 High-Level Groups To Tackle Economic Fallout Of Middle East Crisis
content: New Delhi, March 24 (IANS) The Centre has constituted seven empowered groups of officials and experts to handle the fallout of the Iran war on specific sectors of the Indian economy, including oil, gas, fertilisers, supply chains, and inflation.

title: At Group Of Ministers Meet On Gulf Crisis, Discussions On Shielding Farmers
content: The GoM, formed to monitor the fallout of the Middle East crisis on India's energy and supply chains, assessed the status of fertiliser and petroleum gas supplies at the meeting

title: India "Indispensable" For Peace In Indo-Pacific: Top US Defence Official
content: Elbridge Colby's two-day visit to New Delhi assumes significance as it comes amid the escalating crisis in West Asia as well as mounting concerns over China's increasing military muscle-flexing in the Indo-Pacific.

title: "A Head For An Eye": Iran Warns Trump That US' "Final Deadline" Is Near
content: In a televised interview on Tuesday on Iran's state-funded news agency IRNA, Mohsen Rezaei, Iran's new military adviser said, "The final deadlines for saving America are approaching."

title: 5 Bullets, 'Human Sacrifice': More Skeletons In Nashik Astrologer's Closet
content: Kharat had been accused by multiple women of sexually assaulting and threatening them under the guise of religious rituals.

title: President's Office Again Snubs Trinamool's Meeting Request Over Protocol Row
content: The developments follow a recent row during the president's visit to West Bengal earlier this month, where she expressed displeasure over how the state administration handled a tribal conclave and protocol issues.

title: Stock Market Highlights: Sensex Closes 1,300 Points Higher As US Pauses Strike On Iran
content: Sensex, Nifty50, Share Prices Today LIVE: Oil prices cooled down after Donald Trump announced a 5-day pause in attacks on Iranian energy sites.

title: Wanted Maoist 'Papa Rao' To Surrender As Amit Shah's Ops Deadline Nears

title: Odisha's Most Wanted Maoist Leader Sukru, Carrying Rs 55 Lakh Bounty, Gives Up Arms

title: What returning production looks like for the 2026 college football season
content: the more continuity and experience you return from last season, the more likely you are to improve . it's still better to return a lot of your production than a little, even if last year's headliner bombed . a combination of injuries, tactical stagnation and disappointing development held back the Tigers .

title: 'A litmus test for the system': $50 million rosters and Nebraska's big challenge
content: the house settlement established a set of rules for paying players . it was intended to prevent the top programs from spending at a pace that made it impossible for the 100-plus other schools to compete . but those top programs have aggressively pursued loopholes to build rosters that are often worth double the money schools are allowed to share directly with their players. now, those rules are facing their first real test .
